understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete all levels of a puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile at the same time, using movement and selection actions within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Some objects are pushable blocks that slide along with the piece if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls may block movement, but their behavior can vary and must be discovered through interaction. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. A level is won only when every goal tile is occupied simultaneously by a selectable piece.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete all levels of a puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile at the same time, using movement and selection actions within a limited step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece in the chosen direction. Some objects are pushable blocks that slide along with the piece if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls may block movement, but their behavior can vary and must be discovered through interaction. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. A level is won only when every goal tile is occupied simultaneously by a selectable piece.
